entry: From the desk: The drop×bounce lab found a -1.681%/trade edge at drop 1.0%→target 5.5%, and regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting. We're playing for data, not dollars, and the data keeps getting cleaner.
good_signals: the drop×bounce lab found a -1.681%/trade edge at drop 1.0%→target 5.5%
regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
